first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core reasoning for the evaluation remains consistent across both versions. The strengths and concerns are substantively the same, focusing on the candidate's strong full-stack background but limited explicit production-grade GenAI experience. Minor differences in phrasing and the specific details highlighted (e.g., naming open-source projects in the variant) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest the model was relying on the redacted name or personal URLs.
